zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Le Bigod於1220年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德時，他的父親Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk34歲，母親Maud Matilda Marshall28歲。他和Maud Felbrigg Lady Bigod至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1271年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾平加姆享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Le Bigod was born in 1220, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk, was 34 and his mother, Maud Matilda Marshall, was 28. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Maud Felbrigg Lady Bigod. He died in 1271, in Erpingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Le Bigod est né en 1220, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud Matilda Marshall, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Maud Felbrigg Lady Bigod. Il est décédé en 1271, à Erpingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Le Bigod 1220 in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk 34 und seine Mutter Maud Matilda Marshall 28. Er hatte mit Maud Felbrigg Lady Bigod mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1271 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Erpingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Le Bigodが1220年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで生まれた時，父Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolkは34歳，母Maud Matilda Marshallは28歳であった。彼はMaud Felbrigg Lady Bigodとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1271年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエルパンガムで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Le Bigod(이)가 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Matilda Marshall(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Maud Felbrigg Lady Bigod(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 르핀그함에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Le Bigod родился в 1220 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh le Bigod, Earl of Norfolk было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Matilda Marshall, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Maud Felbrigg Lady Bigod. Он умер в 1271 г. в местности эрпингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
